query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.title,
  p.state,
  p.matchedBusinessLines,
  p.stage,
  p.blScore,
  COUNT(c.id) as totalContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as enrichedContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.enrichmentStatus = 'pending' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingContacts,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' AND c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.title
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.isActive = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.state, p.matchedBusinessLines, p.stage, p.blScore
HAVING sendReadyContacts = 0
ORDER BY p.blScore DESC
LIMIT 30;

  SUM(CASE WHEN c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != '' AND c.enrichmentStatus = 'enriched' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sendReadyContacts
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.title
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.isActive = 1
GROUP BY p.id, p.title, p.state, p.matchedBusinessLines, p.stage, p.blScore

LIMIT 30;
